remarks: Escape to better at Harbor Point's newest luxury, waterfront residential building. Escape's apartments are equipped with top-of-the-line finishes, including floor-to-ceiling windows, wood plank flooring, gleaming Silestone countertops, and full-size stainless-steel appliances. Inspired by the streamlined elegance of the most sophisticated superyachts, Escape's resort-style amenities include a state-of-the-art fitness center, pool, first-class screening room, climate-controlled wine tasting room with private bottle storage, as well as a game room, cafe, and fireplace lounges, and basketball, pickleball and shuffleboard courts. Inspired by the streamlined elegance of the most sophisticated superyachts, Escape's resort-style amenities include a state-of-the-art fitness center, pool, first-class screening room, climate-controlled wine tasting room with private bottle storage, as well as a game room and cafe. Unobstructed waterfront views from Escape's roof decks boast outdoor fireplace lounges, basketball, pickleball, and shuffleboard courts so you can enjoy your best life indoor and out!
